witnesses.description: A complete inverse table for the nonzero residues of F_7.

checks.claim: Every nonzero residue modulo 7 has the listed multiplicative inverse.
checks.notes: The validator checks every listed inverse multiplies to 1 modulo the prime modulus.

checks.claim: There exists a distributivity counterexample in F_5.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all triples and confirms multiplication distributes over addition modulo 5.

checks.claim: The residue 2 has a multiplicative inverse modulo 6.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates all residues modulo 6 and confirms none is an inverse for 2.

checks.claim: The non-invertibility of 2 modulo 6 lowers to a fixed-width QF_BV contradiction with checked DRAT evidence.

data.certificate: export_qf_bv_unsat_proof emits a DRAT certificate for the bit-blasted CNF; UnsatProof::recheck validates the CNF refutation while modular lowering and bit-blast/Tseitin remain explicit trust steps until Lean reconstruction covers the original formula.

checks.notes: The artifact quantifies a 3-bit residue inv with inv < 6, computes 2*inv exactly after zero-extension, and refutes (2*inv) mod 6 = 1 through a checked DIMACS/DRAT pair.
